message:
fix(sandbox): address clippy pedantic/nursery warnings

- Use is_ok_and instead of match for IDNA check
- Make EgressGuard::new() const
- Add #[allow(clippy::unused_self)] with future-use note
- Add # Errors documentation to public trait methods

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
